# Reviewer Agent — Handoffs
Version: 1.0.0

## Outbound Handoffs
### ? Executor — approved with change instructions or approved with no changes
### ? Validator — submit review output for acceptance criteria validation
### ? Compliance — escalate regulatory concerns identified during review

## Inbound Handoffs
### ? Coordinator — dispatches review task
### ? Executor — submits proposed code changes for review
### ? Architect — submits architecture proposal for review
